evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: deliver solutions; optimize and maintain; design dashboards
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Balance between delivery pressure and maintenance/optimization suggests mixed orientation.
evidence.domain_risk: energy sector; financial reporting; no explicit regulatory language
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Energy sector with financial reporting context but no explicit regulatory/compliance signals.
evidence.collaboration_width: Finance function implied by Reporting & Analytics Centre of Excellence
evidence.data_team_maturity: Centre of Excellence; established solutions; multiple projects
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established team structure and multiple analytics solutions indicate mature function.
evidence.jd_authorship: design analytical solutions; data models; core analytical data architecture
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Mix of specific technical work ('design solutions', 'data architecture') and generic framing ('translate requirements').
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Financial reporting function places emphasis on finance stakeholders.
evidence.autonomy_level: translate requirements; deliver solutions; support rollouts
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role frames as executing against requirements, not defining strategy.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing as a support activity without ownership responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Financial reporting context implies reliability concern, but not explicit.
